name: Windcave
description: Windcave payment gateway integration for creating hosted payment sessions, processing merchant-initiated transactions, and managing refunds, completions, and voids via the Windcave REST API.

username.label: REST API Username
username.help_text: The REST API username provided by Windcave for your merchant account.

api_key.label: REST API Key
api_key.help_text: The REST API key provided by Windcave. Combined with the username for HTTP Basic Authentication.

use_test_environment.label: Use UAT/Test Environment
use_test_environment.help_text: Enable to send requests to Windcave's UAT environment instead of production. Requires separate UAT credentials.

create_session.description: Create a Windcave Hosted Payment Page (HPP) session for a purchase, authorisation, or card validation. Returns a URL to redirect the customer to for completing payment.

type.description: Session transaction type. 'purchase' charges the card immediately, 'auth' reserves funds for later completion, 'validate' verifies a card without charging it.

amount.description: Transaction amount, e.g. 19.99. Required for 'purchase' and 'auth' session types.

amount_surcharge.description: Surcharge amount to add on top of 'amount' (e.g. a card processing fee passed on to the customer), e.g. 0.50.

currency.description: 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code, e.g. NZD, AUD, USD.

merchant_reference.description: Your reference for this transaction, shown in Windcave reporting.

methods.description: Payment methods to allow for this session, e.g. ["card"] or ["account2account"]. Defaults to card payments if omitted.

store_card.description: Store the card used in this session as a reusable token for future merchant-initiated transactions.

language.description: Language code for the hosted payment page, e.g. 'en'.

approved_callback_url.description: URL the customer's browser is redirected to after an approved payment.

declined_callback_url.description: URL the customer's browser is redirected to after a declined payment.

cancelled_callback_url.description: URL the customer's browser is redirected to if they cancel the payment.

notification_url.description: Server-to-server URL Windcave sends the transaction result notification to.

state.description: Current state of the session, e.g. 'incomplete' or 'complete'.

hpp_url.description: URL to redirect the customer to for completing payment on Windcave's Hosted Payment Page. Null if the session response does not include an HPP link.

session.description: The full raw session object returned by Windcave.

get_session.description: Retrieve a Windcave session by ID, including the outcome of any transaction attempts made during it.

session_id.description: The Windcave session ID to retrieve.

authorised.description: Whether the most recent transaction attempt in this session was authorised. Null if no attempt has completed yet.

settlement_date.description: The settlement date for the most recent transaction attempt, as reported by Windcave. Null if not yet settled or no attempt has completed.

amount_surcharge.description: The surcharge amount charged on the most recent transaction attempt, if any.

transactions.description: All transaction attempts made during this session.

session.description: The full raw session object returned by Windcave.

create_transaction.description: Create a direct, merchant-initiated transaction (purchase, authorisation, or validation) against a previously stored card token, without redirecting the customer to a hosted payment page.

type.description: Transaction type. 'purchase' charges the card immediately, 'auth' reserves funds for later completion, 'validate' verifies the card without charging it.

amount.description: Transaction amount, e.g. 19.99. Required for 'purchase' and 'auth' transaction types.

amount_surcharge.description: Surcharge amount to add on top of 'amount' (e.g. a card processing fee passed on to the customer), e.g. 0.50.

currency.description: 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code, e.g. NZD, AUD, USD.

merchant_reference.description: Your reference for this transaction, shown in Windcave reporting.

card_id.description: The stored card token ID, obtained from a prior session created with store_card set to true.

settlement_date.description: The settlement date for this transaction, as reported by Windcave. Null if not yet settled.

amount_surcharge.description: The surcharge amount charged on this transaction, if any.

transaction.description: The full raw transaction object returned by Windcave.

get_transaction.description: Retrieve a Windcave transaction by ID.

transaction_id.description: The Windcave transaction ID to retrieve.

settlement_date.description: The settlement date for this transaction, as reported by Windcave. Null if not yet settled.

amount_surcharge.description: The surcharge amount charged on this transaction, if any.

transaction.description: The full raw transaction object returned by Windcave.

complete_transaction.description: Complete a prior 'auth' transaction, capturing the previously reserved funds.

transaction_id.description: The ID of the original 'auth' transaction to complete.

amount.description: Amount to capture, e.g. 19.99. Omit to capture the full authorised amount.

amount_surcharge.description: Surcharge amount to add on top of 'amount', e.g. 0.50.

merchant_reference.description: Your reference for this completion, shown in Windcave reporting.

transaction_id.description: The Windcave transaction ID for this completion.

settlement_date.description: The settlement date for this completion, as reported by Windcave. Null if not yet settled.

amount_surcharge.description: The surcharge amount charged on this completion, if any.

transaction.description: The full raw transaction object returned by Windcave.

refund_transaction.description: Refund a prior purchase or completed transaction, in full or in part, by referencing its transaction ID without needing the original card details.

transaction_id.description: The ID of the original purchase or completed transaction to refund.

amount.description: Amount to refund, e.g. 19.99. Omit to refund the full original amount.

amount_surcharge.description: Surcharge amount to refund on top of 'amount', e.g. 0.50.

merchant_reference.description: Your reference for this refund, shown in Windcave reporting.

transaction_id.description: The Windcave transaction ID for this refund.

settlement_date.description: The settlement date for this refund, as reported by Windcave. Null if not yet settled.

amount_surcharge.description: The surcharge amount refunded, if any.

transaction.description: The full raw transaction object returned by Windcave.

void_transaction.description: Void a prior purchase or authorisation transaction before it settles, cancelling it entirely.

transaction_id.description: The ID of the transaction to void.

merchant_reference.description: Your reference for this void, shown in Windcave reporting.

transaction_id.description: The Windcave transaction ID for this void.

settlement_date.description: The settlement date for this void, as reported by Windcave. Typically null since a voided transaction does not settle.

amount_surcharge.description: The surcharge amount associated with the voided transaction, if any.

transaction.description: The full raw transaction object returned by Windcave.
